content: Hi Jordan! I saw your request about the kitchen sink leak. I have handled dozens of similar cases — usually it is a supply line or P-trap. Happy to come take a look.
Thanks Marcus! Yes it started 2 days ago — water pooling under the cabinet. Not sure if it is from the drain or the supply lines.
Sounds like the P-trap or a compression fitting — very common. Either way it is usually a quick fix. Do you have a shutoff valve under the sink? If so close it to stop the dripping for now.
Yes there is a shutoff I will close it now. When can you come out?
I can come by Saturday at 10am — that is my earliest opening. I will bring parts for both common scenarios so we do not have to make a parts run mid-job.
Saturday at 10am works perfectly. Going to go ahead and book through the app now.
I can come by Thursday afternoon to check the outlet. Does 3pm work for you?
Job complete! Let me know if anything needs touch-up.
Thanks for the 5-star review! It was a pleasure working with you.
I have ants everywhere in the kitchen especially near the window. Can you help this week?
Absolutely. I can come out Wednesday morning. I will bring a targeted treatment that is safe for kitchens.
I noticed a water stain on your ceiling from the upstairs bathroom. I can inspect and find the source. What days work for you?
